requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (JS/IEC 62471 via JSMO)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（经 JSMO 的 JS/IEC 62471）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（經 JSMO 的 JS/IEC 62471）

summary.en: Photobiological safety of LED lamps and luminaires in Jordan is assessed against IEC 62471 （Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems）, adopted as a JS / GSO standard referenced by JSMO. The method classifies products into risk groups from RG0 （Exempt — no hazard） to RG3 （High risk） based on blue-light-weighted radiance and irradiance limits. For regulated LED lighting, JSMO's conformity-assessment package commonly expects a defensible risk-group classification, with RG2/RG3 products carrying usage restrictions and warning requirements. Jordan does not operate the EU's separate energy-label blue-light-class labelling obligation as a distinct horizontal instrument; the photobiological assessment is handled within the safety / conformity-certificate route. Confirm the exact JS/GSO 62471 reference, edition, and whether a risk-group declaration is required for the specific product with JSMO.
summary.zh: 约旦对 LED 灯及灯具的光生物安全依据 IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全）评估，该标准作为 JSMO 引用的 JS/GSO 标准采用。该方法依蓝光加权辐亮度及辐照度限值将产品分为 RG0（豁免——无危害）至 RG3（高危险）危险组别。对于受管制 LED 照明，JSMO 合格评定资料通常要求可辩护的危险组别分类，RG2/RG3 产品须附使用限制及警告要求。约旦不以独立横向制度形式实行欧盟式单独的能效标签蓝光等级标注义务；光生物评估在安全/合格证书路径内处理。请就具体产品向 JSMO 核实确切的 JS/GSO 62471 引用、版本及是否要求危险组别声明。
summary.zht: 約旦對 LED 燈及燈具的光生物安全依據 IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全）評估，該標準作為 JSMO 引用的 JS/GSO 標準採用。該方法依藍光加權輻亮度及輻照度限值將產品分為 RG0（豁免——無危害）至 RG3（高危險）危險組別。對於受管制 LED 照明，JSMO 合格評定資料通常要求可辯護的危險組別分類，RG2/RG3 產品須附使用限制及警告要求。約旦不以獨立橫向制度形式實行歐盟式單獨的能效標籤藍光等級標註義務；光生物評估在安全/合格證書路徑內處理。請就具體產品向 JSMO 核實確切的 JS/GSO 62471 引用、版本及是否要求危險組別聲明。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (adopted as JS/GSO and referenced by JSMO)
JSMO conformity-assessment framework (photobiological risk-group evidence within the safety/conformity certificate)

summary.en: China has adopted GB/T 20145-2006 （Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems）, technically equivalent to IEC 62471:2006. GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard （T = tuijian, recommended） and is not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in the Chinese market; enforcement for residential luminaires is less prescriptive. The risk-group framework （RG0–RG3） is the same international base.
summary.zh: 中国已采用 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），并非对所有中国市场 LED 灯具均为强制要求；对居民灯具的执行规定不够严格。危险组别框架（RG0–RG3）为相同的国际基础。
summary.zht: 中國已採用 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），並非對所有中國市場 LED 燈具均為強制要求；對居民燈具的執行規定不夠嚴格。危險組別框架（RG0–RG3）為相同的國際基礎。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard, equivalent to IEC 62471:2006)

gap.en: Jordan's JS/IEC 62471 and CN GB/T 20145 share the same IEC 62471 technical base and the same RG0–RG3 framework, so underlying photobiological test data is largely transferable. The gap is mainly procedural and one of standing: in China GB/T 20145 is recommended-only and often not enforced for residential luminaires, whereas in Jordan the photobiological assessment is expected within the JSMO conformity-certificate package for regulated lighting. The exporter should: （1） document a defensible risk-group classification, commonly by testing to IEC 62471 （typically targeting RG0/RG1 for general lighting）; （2） include warnings/usage instructions for RG2 and above; （3） submit the classification within the JSMO conformity package via the in-country importer. Note Jordan does not add the EU's separate blue-light-class energy-label requirement — the assessment sits inside the safety/conformity route. Confirm with JSMO whether an explicit risk-group declaration is required for the specific product.
gap.zh: 约旦 JS/IEC 62471 与中国 GB/T 20145 共享相同的 IEC 62471 技术基础及相同的 RG0–RG3 框架，故底层光生物检测数据大体可转用。差距主要在程序及地位：在中国 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性，对居民灯具常不强制执行，而在约旦对受管制照明，光生物评估须纳入 JSMO 合格证书资料。出口商应：（1）记录可辩护的危险组别分类，通常按 IEC 62471 检测（通用照明通常目标 RG0/RG1）；（2）为 RG2 及以上提供警告/使用说明；（3）通过在地进口商在 JSMO 合格资料内提交分类。注意约旦不另加欧盟式单独的蓝光等级能效标签要求——评估位于安全/合格路径内。请向 JSMO 确认具体产品是否须明确危险组别声明。
gap.zht: 約旦 JS/IEC 62471 與中國 GB/T 20145 共享相同的 IEC 62471 技術基礎及相同的 RG0–RG3 框架，故底層光生物檢測數據大體可轉用。差距主要在程序及地位：在中國 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性，對居民燈具常不強制執行，而在約旦對受管制照明，光生物評估須納入 JSMO 合格證書資料。出口商應：（1）記錄可辯護的危險組別分類，通常按 IEC 62471 檢測（通用照明通常目標 RG0/RG1）；（2）為 RG2 及以上提供警告/使用說明；（3）通過在地進口商在 JSMO 合格資料內提交分類。注意約旦不另加歐盟式單獨的藍光等級能效標籤要求——評估位於安全/合格路徑內。請向 JSMO 確認具體產品是否須明確危險組別聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (within conformity route) — photobiological risk classification against JS/IEC 62471 expected within the JSMO conformity-certificate package for regulated lighting; RG2/RG3 carry usage restrictions and warnings; no separate EU-style blue-light-class energy-label obligation
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145-2006 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; enforcement for residential luminaires is not universally prescribed

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Jordan assesses photobiological safety of LED lighting against JS/IEC 62471 within the JSMO conformity-certificate route, using the same RG0–RG3 framework as China's recommended GB/T 20145. Test data is largely transferable, but the classification must be documented and submitted within the JSMO package via the in-country importer (and is more consistently expected than under CN's recommended-only standard). Jordan has no separate EU-style blue-light-class energy-label requirement. Confirm with JSMO whether an explicit risk-group declaration is required for the specific product.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 约旦在 JSMO 合格证书路径内依据 JS/IEC 62471 评估 LED 照明的光生物安全，采用与中国推荐性 GB/T 20145 相同的 RG0–RG3 框架。检测数据大体可转用，但分类须记录并通过在地进口商在 JSMO 资料内提交（且较中国仅推荐性标准更一致地被要求）。约旦无欧盟式单独的蓝光等级能效标签要求。请向 JSMO 确认具体产品是否须明确危险组别声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 約旦在 JSMO 合格證書路徑內依據 JS/IEC 62471 評估 LED 照明的光生物安全，採用與中國推薦性 GB/T 20145 相同的 RG0–RG3 框架。檢測數據大體可轉用，但分類須記錄並通過在地進口商在 JSMO 資料內提交（且較中國僅推薦性標準更一致地被要求）。約旦無歐盟式單獨的藍光等級能效標籤要求。請向 JSMO 確認具體產品是否須明確危險組別聲明。

requirement_topic.zh: 自镇流 LED 灯性能（JS/IEC 62560 / 60969）
requirement_topic.zht: 自鎮流 LED 燈性能（JS/IEC 62560 / 60969）

summary.en: Self-ballasted LED lamps （retrofit LED bulbs with integral driver, > 50 V） placed on the Jordanian market are assessed against JS/IEC 62560 （Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Safety specifications） for safety, and commonly against IEC 62612 / 60969-type performance methods for performance characteristics （luminous flux, efficacy, colour, lifetime claims）, adopted as JS/GSO references by JSMO. These ensure lamps are safe and that marked performance claims are substantiated. Lamps must be rated for the Jordanian 230 V, 50 Hz grid. The conformity certificate and energy label depend on this evidence. Confirm the exact JS/GSO safety and performance references and editions accepted by JSMO for the specific lamp type.
summary.zh: 投放约旦市场的自镇流 LED 灯（带集成驱动器的改装 LED 灯泡，> 50 V）在安全方面依 JS/IEC 62560（普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求）评估，性能特性（光通量、光效、颜色、寿命声称）通常依 IEC 62612 / 60969 型性能方法评估，上述均作为 JSMO 的 JS/GSO 引用采用。这些确保灯具安全且标注的性能声称有依据。灯须按约旦 230 V、50 Hz 电网标定。合格证书及能效标签依赖该证据。请就具体灯型向 JSMO 核实其接受的确切 JS/GSO 安全及性能引用与版本。
summary.zht: 投放約旦市場的自鎮流 LED 燈（帶集成驅動器的改裝 LED 燈泡，> 50 V）在安全方面依 JS/IEC 62560（普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求）評估，性能特性（光通量、光效、顏色、壽命聲稱）通常依 IEC 62612 / 60969 型性能方法評估，上述均作為 JSMO 的 JS/GSO 引用採用。這些確保燈具安全且標註的性能聲稱有依據。燈須按約旦 230 V、50 Hz 電網標定。合格證書及能效標籤依賴該證據。請就具體燈型向 JSMO 核實其接受的確切 JS/GSO 安全及性能引用與版本。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety specifications (adopted as JS/GSO and referenced by JSMO)
IEC 62612 / IEC 60969-type performance methods for self-ballasted LED lamps (adopted as JS/GSO references)

summary.en: China's equivalents are GB 24906-2010 （Self-ballasted LED-lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety requirements） and GB/T 24908 （Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting — Performance requirements）, aligned with IEC 62560 and IEC 62612 respectively. Safety for in-scope self-ballasted lamps is tied to CCC where applicable; performance methods support the China Energy Label. Chinese test reports and CCC certificates are not automatically accepted by JSMO.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 24906-2010（普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯 > 50 V——安全要求）及 GB/T 24908（普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——性能要求），分别与 IEC 62560 及 IEC 62612 对齐。范围内自镇流灯的安全在适用时与 CCC 挂钩；性能方法支撑中国能效标识。中国检测报告及 CCC 证书不自动被 JSMO 接受。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 24906-2010（普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈 > 50 V——安全要求）及 GB/T 24908（普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——性能要求），分別與 IEC 62560 及 IEC 62612 對齊。範圍內自鎮流燈的安全在適用時與 CCC 掛鈎；性能方法支撐中國能效標識。中國檢測報告及 CCC 證書不自動被 JSMO 接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 24906-2010 — Self-ballasted LED-lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety requirements (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 62560)
GB/T 24908 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting — Performance requirements (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 62612)

gap.en: Jordan's JS/IEC 62560 and CN GB 24906 share the IEC 62560 safety base, and the performance methods both derive from the IEC 62612/60969 family, so the technical content is largely harmonized and re-testing burden is moderate. The gaps are: （1） voltage rating — Chinese lamps built for 220 V must be confirmed suitable for and tested at Jordan's 230 V （50 Hz matches）; （2） Chinese GB/CCC evidence is not accepted by JSMO — test reports against the JS/GSO references must be packaged for the JSMO conformity certificate; （3） marked performance claims （flux, efficacy, lifetime） must be substantiated against the JS/GSO performance method that JSMO accepts, which feeds the Jordanian energy label; （4） the in-country importer submits the evidence. Confirm the exact accepted editions and whether per-shipment or registration-type conformity applies.
gap.zh: 约旦 JS/IEC 62560 与中国 GB 24906 共享 IEC 62560 安全基础，性能方法均源自 IEC 62612/60969 系列，故技术内容基本协调，重新检测负担适中。差距为：（1）电压标定——为 220 V 设计的中国灯须确认适用并按约旦 230 V 检测（50 Hz 相同）；（2）中国 GB/CCC 证据不被 JSMO 接受——须将针对 JS/GSO 引用的检测报告打包用于 JSMO 合格证书；（3）标注的性能声称（光通量、光效、寿命）须依 JSMO 接受的 JS/GSO 性能方法证实，并据以生成约旦能效标签；（4）由在地进口商提交证据。请确认接受的确切版本及适用逐批或注册型式合格评定。
gap.zht: 約旦 JS/IEC 62560 與中國 GB 24906 共享 IEC 62560 安全基礎，性能方法均源自 IEC 62612/60969 系列，故技術內容基本協調，重新檢測負擔適中。差距為：（1）電壓標定——為 220 V 設計的中國燈須確認適用並按約旦 230 V 檢測（50 Hz 相同）；（2）中國 GB/CCC 證據不被 JSMO 接受——須將針對 JS/GSO 引用的檢測報告打包用於 JSMO 合格證書；（3）標註的性能聲稱（光通量、光效、壽命）須依 JSMO 接受的 JS/GSO 性能方法證實，並據以生成約旦能效標籤；（4）由在地進口商提交證據。請確認接受的確切版本及適用逐批或註冊型式合格評定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — self-ballasted LED lamp safety against JS/IEC 62560 (and substantiated performance against the accepted JS/GSO method) required within the JSMO conformity certificate; lamps must be rated for 230 V, 50 Hz
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (safety, where in scope) — GB 24906-2010 safety tied to CCC where applicable; GB/T 24908 performance supports the China Energy Label

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Self-ballasted LED lamps for Jordan are assessed for safety against JS/IEC 62560 and for substantiated performance against the accepted JS/GSO (IEC 62612/60969-family) method, within the JSMO conformity certificate. The technical base is largely harmonized with CN GB 24906 / GB/T 24908, but CN GB/CCC evidence is not accepted by JSMO and must be re-packaged against the JS/GSO references. Lamps must be rated and tested for Jordan's 230 V, 50 Hz grid (50 Hz matches China; nominal voltage differs from 220 V). The in-country importer submits the evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出口约旦的自镇流 LED 灯在 JSMO 合格证书内依 JS/IEC 62560 评估安全，并依接受的 JS/GSO（IEC 62612/60969 系列）方法证实性能。技术基础与中国 GB 24906 / GB/T 24908 基本协调，但中国 GB/CCC 证据不被 JSMO 接受，须依 JS/GSO 引用重新打包。灯须按约旦 230 V、50 Hz 电网标定并检测（50 Hz 与中国相同；标称电压与 220 V 不同）。由在地进口商提交证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出口約旦的自鎮流 LED 燈在 JSMO 合格證書內依 JS/IEC 62560 評估安全，並依接受的 JS/GSO（IEC 62612/60969 系列）方法證實性能。技術基礎與中國 GB 24906 / GB/T 24908 基本協調，但中國 GB/CCC 證據不被 JSMO 接受，須依 JS/GSO 引用重新打包。燈須按約旦 230 V、50 Hz 電網標定並檢測（50 Hz 與中國相同；標稱電壓與 220 V 不同）。由在地進口商提交證據。
